calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Set For Trial On Jun-16-16 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 504

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Continued To Jun-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for trial de novo .
Dept. 504, Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings not reported.

Katrina C. Decker, Esq., specially appearing for Respondent/Plaintiff.
Respondent/Plaintiff William J. Cencak II is present this day.
Self-represent Appellant/Defendant Brian Sullivan appearing on his own behalf.

Appellant Brian Sullivan is sworn and testified on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Appellant's Exhibit 1. Appeal Documents/Group of documents containing Tabs. A, B, C, D, E, F, G AND H.
Respondent William J. Cendak, II is sworn and testified on his own behalf.
The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent's Exhibit A. Letter dated June 14, 2016 To Whom It May Concern from Michael
Battaini.
After oral and documentary evidence is introduced by the respective parties, the Court ordered the matter under submission this day. Exhibits introduced this day are retained by the Court.

Court adjourned.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Apr-18-2016 Judgment Entered
